convention: emotion_directions[e][L] = DOSE_UNIT·median‖h‖[L]·normalize(mean(emotion_e)−mean(neutral)) at post-block-L. Steering hook adds α·dir at α>0 (positive doses only). emotions[] gives the row order.
uncharted_note: Non-human-readable directions: orthogonal to the named-emotion subspace, renderable by the NLA decoder but NOT by the token head — off-manifold structure, not emotions. Scaled at uncharted_dose_unit·median‖h‖[L20]. Blade-Runner-named (tears in rain). See docs/MANIFOLD_ABLATION.md.
